calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-08-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, Michael Rossoff, Esq., and defendant Pitner present and represented by Ann Hawkins, Esq. The cause is settled by stipulation with Ms. Pitner, the remaing defendants were not present. Resolution, in the absence of the non-appearing defendants, appearing adequate to the Plaintiff, the Court orders the matter off calendar and vacates the trial date.
